ddls:
CREATE TABLE "trades" (
  "trade_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each trade */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the trade */,
  "ltd" TEXT /* Last trading day (expiry date) */,
  "strike" INTEGER /* Strike price of the option */,
  "c_or_p" TEXT /* Type of option (call or put) */,
  "open" REAL /* Opening price of the trade */,
  "high" REAL /* Highest price of the trade */,
  "low" REAL /* Lowest price of the trade */,
  "close" REAL /* Closing price of the trade */,
  "final_p" REAL /* Final price of the trade */,
  "volume" INTEGER /* Trading volume */,
  "oi" INTEGER /* Open interest */,
  "weekdays" TEXT /* Day of the week */,
  "market_exchange_id" INTEGER /* Market exchange ID */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the trade was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the trade was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("trade_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trades_market_exchange_id FOREIGN KEY ("market_exchange_id") REFERENCES market_exchanges ("market_exchange_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "instruments" (
  "instrument_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each instrument */,
  "instrument_name" TEXT /* Name of the instrument */,
  "instrument_type" TEXT /* Type of instrument (stock, index, commodity) */,
  "isin" TEXT /* International Securities Identification Number (ISIN) */,
  "sector" TEXT /* Sector of the instrument */,
  "industry" TEXT /* Industry of the instrument */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the instrument was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the instrument was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("instrument_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "trade_instruments" (
  "trade_id" INTEGER /* ID of the trade */,
  "instrument_id" INTEGER /* ID of the instrument associated with the trade */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the association was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the association was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("trade_id", "instrument_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "market_exchanges" (
  "market_exchange_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each market exchange */,
  "market_exchange_name" TEXT /* Name of the market exchange */,
  "market_exchange_code" TEXT /* Code of the market exchange */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the market exchange */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the market exchange was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the market exchange was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("market_exchange_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "market_data_providers" (
  "market_data_provider_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each market data provider */,
  "market_data_provider_name" TEXT /* Name of the market data provider */,
  "market_data_provider_code" TEXT /* Code of the market data provider */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the market data provider was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the market data provider was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("market_data_provider_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "trade_market_data" (
  "trade_id" INTEGER /* ID of the trade */,
  "market_data_provider_id" INTEGER /* ID of the market data provider */,
  "market_data" TEXT /* Market data for the trade */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the market data was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the market data was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("trade_id", "market_data_provider_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "trade_analytics" (
  "trade_id" INTEGER /* ID of the trade */,
  "trading_volume" INTEGER /* Trading volume for the trade */,
  "open_interest" INTEGER /* Open interest for the trade */,
  "implied_volatility" REAL /* Implied volatility for the trade */,
  "delta" REAL /* Delta for the trade */,
  "gamma" REAL /* Gamma for the trade */,
  "theta" REAL /* Theta for the trade */,
  "vega" REAL /* Vega for the trade */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the analytics data was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the analytics data was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("trade_id")
)
